facebook.caption:
POV: you wandered down 30 Tháng 4 Street and found the Vietnamese restaurant locals are actually rating 4.9 stars.

Sen River Restaurant. 167 reviews. Almost perfect score.

No resort markup. No tourist menu. Just Vietnamese food that earns that rating every single day.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
